backpack.pvp: Increases the radius of disorient on Apex Predator kills from 5m to 10m.

bonus_set_4.name: Huddle
bonus_set_4.pve:
Receive +1 Skill Tier for each ally Agent that is within the range of you Hive or Smart Cover.
While at Skill Tier 6, having at least one ally Agent in the range of your Hive of Smart Cover for 4s will grant Overcharge for 15s.
Cooldown: 40s Mortars and enemy Skills that enter the range of your Hive or Smart Cover will be destroyed.
Cooldown 10s.
The cooldown is 20% faster for each ally Agent within the range of your Hive or Smart Cover.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Receive +1 Skill Tier for each ally Agent that is within the range of you Hive or Smart Cover.
While at Skill Tier 6, having at least one ally Agent in the range of your Hive of Smart Cover for 8s will grant Overcharge for 10s.
Cooldown: 80s Mortars and enemy Skills that enter the range of your Hive or Smart Cover will be destroyed.
Cooldown 10s.
The cooldown is 20% faster for each ally Agent within the range of your Hive or Smart Cover. (Overcharge has no functionality in PvP environments.)

chest.name: Hivemind
chest.pve: Decrease the Overcharge cooldown from 40 to 25.
chest.pvp: Decrease the Overcharge cooldown from 80 to 40.

backpack.name: Smart Cooperation
backpack.pve: Decrease the cooldown for destroying Mortars and enemy Skills from 10 to 1.
backpack.pvp: Decrease the cooldown for destroying Mortars and enemy Skills from 10 to 5.

bonus_set_4.name: Crowd Control
bonus_set_4.pve:
Critical hits mark enemies for 20s, up to 3 marks total.
When you critically hit a marked enemy, all other marked enemies take 60% of the damage dealt.
Whenever a marked enemy dies, gain +2% critical hit damage, stacking up to 20 times, or until combat ends.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Critical hits mark enemies for 10s, up to 3 marks total.
When you critically hit a marked enemy, all other marked enemies within 10m take 30% of the damage dealt.
Whenever a marked enemy dies, gain +2% critical hit damage, stacking up to 15 times, or until combat ends.

chest.name: Target Rich Environment
chest.pve: Increases Crowd Control mark count from 3 to 5.
chest.pvp: Increases Crowd Control mark count from 3 to 4.

backpack.name: Critical Measures
backpack.pve: Increases Crowd Control damage to additional marked enemies from 60% to 112%.
backpack.pvp: Increases Crowd Control damage to additional marked enemies from 30% to 50%.

bonus_set_4.name: Rules of Engagement
bonus_set_4.pve:
Hollow-Point Ammo is automatically added to your active weapon when killing status afflicted enemies.
Hollow-Point Ammo amplifies weapon damage by 20% and applies bleed on hit.
Shooting a status affected enemy will apply a mark.
Killing a marked enemy grants a full clip of Hollow-Point Ammo for your active weapon, and half a clip of the agent's active weapon to the rest of the party.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Hollow-Point Ammo is automatically added to your active weapon when killing status afflicted enemies.
Hollow-Point Ammo amplifies weapon damage by 20% and applies bleed on hit.
Shooting a status affected enemy will apply a mark.
Killing a marked enemy grants a full clip of Hollow-Point Ammo for your active weapon, and half a clip of the agent's active weapon to the rest of the party.
Mark lasts for 6 seconds.

chest.name: Parabellum Rounds
chest.pve:
Increases Hollow-Point Ammo damage amplification from 20% to 50%.
Does not effect party ammo.
chest.pvp:
Increases Hollow-Point Ammo damage amplification from 20% to 36%.
Does not effect party ammo.

backpack.name: Trauma Specialist
backpack.pve: Increases duration of bleed status effects by 50% Increases all bleed damage done by 100%
backpack.pvp: Increases duration of bleed status effects by 25% Increases all bleed damage done by 50%

chest.name: Chain Combustion
chest.pve: Enemies set ablaze by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype ignite other enemies within 2m.
chest.pvp: Enemies set ablaze by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype ignite other enemies within 2m.

backpack.name: Heatstroke
backpack.pve: +25% Weapon Damage to enemies set on fire by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype +25% Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype Range.
backpack.pvp: +25% Weapon Damage to enemies set on fire by the Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype +25% Ortiz Incinerator Turret Prototype Range.

bonus_set_4.name: Return to Sender
bonus_set_4.pve:
Receive repairs of 10% of the damage dealt by your Skills.
Your allies receive repairs of 20% of the damage dealt by your Skills. (Range 45m)
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Receive repairs of 12% of the damage dealt by your Skills.
Your allies receive repairs of 12% of the damage dealt by your Skills. (Range 30m)

chest.name: Increased Interest
chest.pve: Increase the repairs received from Return to Sender from 10% to 25% and from 20% to 35%.
chest.pvp: Increase the repairs received from Return to Sender from 12% to 14% and from 12% to 18%.

backpack.name: Over-engineered
backpack.pve:
While at full Armor, repairs received from Return to Sender will provide Bonus Armor, up to 80% of your Total Armor.
Does not apply to allies.
backpack.pvp:
While at full Armor, repairs received from Return to Sender will provide Bonus Armor, up to 60% of your Total Armor.
Does not apply to allies.

bonus_set_4.name: Tend and Befriend
bonus_set_4.pve:
Interacting with your deployed skills grants the skill 25% skill damage for 10s.
This buff cannot be refreshed.
Interaction include: - Using / Deploying the Skill - Changing the skills target - Healing the skill
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Interacting with your deployed skills grants the skill 18% skill damage for 6s.
This buff cannot be refreshed.
Interaction include: - Using / Deploying the Skill - Changing the skills target - Healing the skill

chest.name: Best Buds
chest.pve: Increase the damage buff from 25% to 50%.
chest.pvp: Increase the damage buff from 18% to 24%.

backpack.name: Complete Uptime
backpack.pve: Cancelling your skills will reset their cooldown.
backpack.pvp: Cancelling your skills will reset their cooldown.

bonus_set_4.name: Striker's Gamble
bonus_set_4.pve:
Weapon hits increase total weapon damage by 0.65%, stacking up to 100 times.
1 stacks lost per second between 0 to 50 stacks; 2 stacks lost per second between 51 and 100 stacks.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Weapon hits increase total weapon damage by 0.24%, stacking up to 100 times.
1 stacks lost per second between 0 to 50 stacks; 2 stacks lost per second between 51 and 100 stacks.

chest.name: Press the Advantage
chest.pve:
Increases max stacks for Striker窶冱 Gamble from 100 to 200.
3 stacks lost per second between 101 and 200 stacks.
chest.pvp:
Increases max stacks for Striker窶冱 Gamble from 100 to 200.
4 stacks lost per second between 101 and 200 stacks.

backpack.name: Risk Management
backpack.pve: Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker窶冱 Gamble from 0.65% to 0.9%.
backpack.pvp: Increases total weapon damage gained per stack of Striker窶冱 Gamble from 0.24% to 0.38%.

bonus_set_4.name: Hackstep Protocol
bonus_set_4.pve:
Replaces armor kits with an instant, infinite- use ability on a 20s cooldown, that repairs 20% armor, grants 50% bonus armor and hides your nameplate for 5s.
Increses total weapon damage by 2% per 5% bonus armor gained, up to 20%.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Replaces armor kits with an instant, infinite- use ability on a 22s cooldown, that repairs 33% armor, grants 40% bonus armor and hides your nameplate for 4s.
Increses total weapon damage by 2% per 5% bonus armor gained, up to 24%.

chest.name: Compiler Optimization
chest.pve: Decreases Hackstep Protocol cooldown from 20s to 15s.
chest.pvp: Decreases Hackstep Protocol cooldown from 22s to 16s.

backpack.name: Multithreaded Execution
backpack.pve: Increases Hackstep Protocol bonus armor from 50% to 100%.
backpack.pvp: Increases Hackstep Protocol bonus armor from 40% to 80%.

bonus_set_4.name: Aggressive Recon
bonus_set_4.pve:
Getting a Signature Weapon kill gives +15%.
Signature Weapon Damage for 10s and +25% Reload Speed for the next reload of the weapon (the bonuses do not stack).
Automatically regenerate Signature Weapon Ammo every 60s.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Damaging enemies with a grenade increases total weapon damage by 15% for 10s.
Automatically generate grenade ammo every 60s.

chest.name: Specialized Destruction
chest.pve:
Increase Aggressive Recon Signature Weapon Damage bonus from 15% to 30%.
Every 3rd Signature Weapon kill generates Signature Weapon ammo.
chest.pvp:
Increase Aggressive Recon Signature Weapon Damage bonus from 15% to 30%.
Every 3rd Signature Weapon kill generates Signature Weapon ammo.

backpack.name: Signature Moves
backpack.pve:
+50% Weapon Damage for 15s after fully depleting the Signature Weapon of ammo.
Doubles the amount of ammo generated by Aggressive Recon.
backpack.pvp:
+26% Weapon Damage for 20s after fully depleting the Signature Weapon of ammo.
Doubles the amount of ammo generated by Aggressive Recon. (Specialization / Signature Weapon has no functionality in PvP environments.)

bonus_set_4.name: Throttle Control
bonus_set_4.pve:
Shooting builds stacks to a max of 50.
Each stack provides +0.5% Weapon Handling and +4% Critical Hit Damage.
Lose 6 stacks per second while not shooting.
No stacks are lost if an enemy is Suppressed.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Shooting builds stacks to a max of 40.
Each stack provides +0.6% Weapon Handling and +2% Critical Hit Damage.
Lose 4 stacks per second while not shooting.
No stacks are lost if an enemy is Suppressed. (Suppression has no functionality against agents in PvP environments.)

chest.name: Sustainability
chest.pve: Increase the maximum number of stacks from 50 to 75.
chest.pvp: Increase the maximum number of stacks from 40 to 60.

backpack.name: Snowball
backpack.pve: Increase the Critical Hit Damage received per stack from 4% to 7%.
backpack.pvp: Increase the Critical Hit Damage received per stack from 2% to 3%.

bonus_set_4.name: Red, White and Blue
bonus_set_4.pve:
Enemies you shoot receive stacking debuffs of Red/White/Blue.
Changes every 2 seconds.
Red: Amplifies the enemy's damage taken by 8%.
White: Hitting the enemy restores you and your allies' armor by 2% once every second
Blue: Decreases enemy damage dealt by 8%.
Full Flag: Enemies that die while under the effect of all three debuffs create a 5m explosion, dealing damage equal to their total health and armor.
Explosion strength is reduced on Named enemy deaths.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Enemies you shoot receive stacking debuffs of Red/White/Blue.
Changes every 2 seconds.
Red: Amplifies the enemy's damage taken by 6%.
White: Hitting the enemy restores you and your allies' armor by 1% once every second
Blue: Decreases enemy damage dealt by 6%.
Full Flag: Enemies that die while under the effect of all three debuffs create a 6m explosion, dealing damage equal to their total health and armor.
Explosion strength is reduced on Named enemy deaths.

chest.name: Waving the Flag
chest.pve: Increases Red, White, and Blue rotation speed to 1.5 seconds.
chest.pvp: Increases Red, White, and Blue rotation speed to 1.4 seconds.

backpack.name: Patriotic Boost
backpack.pve:
Increases Red, White, and Blue debuff strength.
Red: From 8% to 12%
White: From 2% to 3%
Blue: From 8% to 12%.
backpack.pvp:
Increases Red, White, and Blue debuff strength.
Red: From 6% to 10%
White: From 1% to 2%
Blue: From 6% to 10%.

chest.name: From the Shadows
chest.pve: Increases max stacks for Into the Light from 50 to 100, stack gain from 10 to 20 and stack consumption from 10 to 20.
chest.pvp: Increases max stacks for Into the Light from 50 to 100, stack gain from 10 to 20 and stack consumption from 10 to 20.

backpack.name: Into the Light
backpack.pve: Increases max stacks for From the Shadows from 50 to 100 and stack gain from 10 to 20.
backpack.pvp: Increases max stacks for From the Shadows from 50 to 100 and stack gain from 10 to 20.

bonus_set_4.name: Symphony
bonus_set_4.pve:
Killing an enemy further than 25m will provide +40% Weapon Damage to Shotguns, SMG's and Pistols, +20% Weapon Damage to AR's and LMG's and 25% Bonus Armor for 15s.
Killing an enemy within 25m will provide +40% Weapon Damage to MMR's and Rifles, +20% Weapon Damage to AR's and LMG's and +30% Headshot Damage for 15s.
Intermittently killing enemies from both ranges will build up stacks.
At 4 stacks, all bonuses are multiplied by 1.5 and triggered at the same time for 15s.
No stacks are acquired while talent bonuses are active.
bonus_set_4.pvp:
Killing an enemy further than 25m will provide +22% Weapon Damage to Shotguns, SMG's and Pistols, +24% Weapon Damage to AR's and LMG's and 30% Bonus Armor for 8s.
Killing an enemy within 25m will provide +38% Weapon Damage to MMR's and Rifles, +24% Weapon Damage to AR's and LMG's and +26% Headshot Damage for 8s.
Intermittently killing enemies from both ranges will build up stacks.
At 4 stacks, all bonuses are multiplied by 1.5 and triggered at the same time for 8s.
No stacks are acquired while talent bonuses are active.

chest.name: Fortissimo
chest.pve: Double the Weapon Damage of Symphony.
chest.pvp: Double the Weapon Damage of Symphony.

backpack.name: Accelerando
backpack.pve: Decrease the number of stacks needed to proc the Symphony double buffs from 4 to 3.
backpack.pvp: Decrease the number of stacks needed to proc the Symphony double buffs from 4 to 3.

talents.name: Perturb
talents.pve:
While this weapon is holstered, generate 50% less Threat when shooting.
Keeping this weapon holstered for 10s will prime it.
While primed, swapping to this weapon grants +25% Rate of Fire, +30% Weapon Damage and you generate 100% more Threat when shooting for 20s.
Swapping from this weapon before the timer ends removes the bonuses.
talents.pvp:
While this weapon is holstered, generate 50% less Threat when shooting.
Keeping this weapon holstered for 10s will prime it.
While primed, swapping to this weapon grants +10% Rate of Fire, +22% Weapon Damage and you generate 100% more Threat when shooting for 8s.
Swapping from this weapon before the timer ends removes the bonuses.

talents.name: Capacitance
talents.pve:
Shooting enemies builds stacks to a cap of 40.
Each stack grants 1.5% Skill Damage.
After 5 seconds, stacks decay 1 per second.
For each skill tier core attribute gain 7.5% Weapon Damage.
talents.pvp:
Shooting enemies builds stacks to a cap of 40.
Each stack grants 0.4% Skill Damage.
After 6 seconds, stacks decay 2 per second.
For each skill tier core attribute gain 3.4% Weapon Damage.

talents.name: Adaptive Instincts
talents.pve:
Hitting 30 headshots grants 20% critical hit chance and 50% critical hit damage for 45 seconds.
Hitting 65 body shots grants 90% weapon damage for 45 seconds.
Hitting 20 leg shots grants 150% reload speed for 45 seconds.
Exiting combat refreshes timer on all active buffs.
talents.pvp:
Hitting 30 headshots grants 15% critical hit chance and 40% critical hit damage for 20 seconds.
Hitting 65 body shots grants 32% weapon damage for 20 seconds.
Hitting 20 leg shots grants 100% reload speed for 20 seconds.
Exiting combat refreshes timer on all active buffs.

talents.name: Eagle Strike
talents.pve:
Accuracy increases as you continuously fire, up to 30%.
Headshot kills grant the Tenacity buff for 15 seconds.
The damage reduction of Tenacity is increased by 1% for body shots and 5% for headshots.
talents.pvp:
Accuracy increases as you continuously fire, up to 30%.
Headshot kills grant the Tenacity buff for 10 seconds.
The damage reduction of Tenacity is increased by 1% for body shots and 5% for headshots.

talents.name: Tenacity
talents.pve: 40%-80% of damage taken is delayed until the buff expires. (Depends on the number of shots above) All of the total delayed damage is reduced for each enemy killed while the buff is active, up to 100% with 3 kills.
talents.pvp: 30%-70% of damage taken is delayed until the buff expires. (Depends on the number of shots Above) All of the total delayed damage is reduced for each enemy killed while the buff is active, up to 100% with 3 kills.

talents.name: Actum Est
talents.pve: Shooting an enemy gives 1 stack, at 100 stacks the next magazine is 100% filled with shock ammo.
talents.pvp: Shooting an enemy gives 1 stack, at 100 stacks the next magazine is 10% filled with shock ammo.

talents.name: Unnerve
talents.pve:
Killing an enemy will apply a mark on every enemy within 20m.
Mutiple marks can be applied to the same enemy.
Max number of marks that can be applied to an enemy is 5.
All marks on an enemy will disappear 10s after the last one has been applied.
Deal +15% Amplified Damage per mark to marked enemies.
talents.pvp:
Killing an enemy will apply a mark on every enemy within 10m.
Mutiple marks can be applied to the same enemy.
Max number of marks that can be applied to an enemy is 3.
All marks on an enemy will disappear 8s after the last one has been applied.
Deal +10% Amplified Damage per mark to marked enemies.

talents.name: Big Game Hunter
talents.pve:
When scoped, switches to semi-automatic mode, dealing 450% weapon damage with each shot.
Headshots grant +6% headshot damage.
Stacks up to 25 times.
Once at full stacks, 10 stacks decay every 4 seconds until all stacks have been removed.
Headshots delay decaying of stacks.
talents.pvp:
When scoped, switches to semi-automatic mode, dealing 450% weapon damage with each shot.
Headshots grant +1% headshot damage.
Stacks up to 20 times.
Once at full stacks, 5 stacks decay every 2 seconds until all stacks have been removed.
Headshots delay decaying of stacks.

talents.name: Payment in kind
talents.pve:
Dealing damage to enemies adds a stack of 2% Critical Hit Damage.
Stacks last for 10s and are capped to 100.
On Reload, applies a 10s bleed to yourself which deals 0.5% armor damage per stack.
talents.pvp:
Dealing damage to enemies adds a stack of 1.8% Critical Hit Damage.
Stacks last for 8s and are capped to 90.
On Reload, applies a 8s bleed to yourself which deals 0.6% armor damage per stack.

talents.name: Breathe Free
talents.pve:
When moving, gains 4 stacks per second or 8 stacks if sprinting.
Max stack is equal to the weapon's Mag Size.
Each round fired consumes a stack, amplifying damage by 75%.
Kills grants +20% movement speed for 10 seconds.
talents.pvp:
When moving, gains 2 stacks per second or 4 stacks if sprinting.
Max stack is equal to the weapon's Mag Size.
Each round fired consumes a stack, amplifying damage by 20%.
Kills grants +6% movement speed for 10 seconds.

talents.name: Rule them all
talents.pve:
When the agent has a Status Effect applied to them, 50% of the ammo in their next magazine will apply the same Status Effect to their targets.
This effect will only occur during combat.
talents.pvp:
When the agent has a Status Effect applied to them, 20% of the ammo in their next magazine will apply the same Status Effect to their targets.
This effect will only occur during combat.

talents.name: Symbiosis
talents.pve:
While having a Shield deployed, lose Shield Health at a rate of 10% per second.
Your Shield receives repairs of 25% of the damage dealt by this weapon.
talents.pvp:
While having a Shield deployed, lose Shield Health at a rate of 10% per second.
Your Shield receives repairs of 25% of the damage dealt by this weapon.

talents.name: Incessant Chatter
talents.pve:
When you reload, rate of fire is increased by 25% for each enemy within 15 meters for the duration of that magazine.
Max stacks: 5 Kills refill 50% of your magazine.
talents.pvp:
When you reload, rate of fire is increased by 20% for each enemy within 15 meters for the duration of that magazine.
Max stacks: 4 Kills refill 40% of your magazine.

talents.name: Cover Shooter
talents.pve:
Every bullet fired while in cover increases Weapon Damage by 1% up to 100%.
The bonus lasts for 15s.
Getting a kill with this weapon while in cover resets the duration.
The bonus damage is cancelled by reloading, swapping weapons or exiting combat.
talents.pvp:
Every bullet fired while in cover increases Weapon Damage by 0.8% up to 80%.
The bonus lasts for 15s.
Getting a kill with this weapon while in cover resets the duration.
The bonus damage is cancelled by reloading, swapping weapons or exiting combat.

talents.name: Disruptor Rounds
talents.pve:
Shooting an enemy marks them and adds a stack to a count of 50.
Shooting a marked enemy refreshes the mark and adds stacks to the agent.
When you deploy a non-shield skill, remove all stacks on agent and all marked targets trigger an effect.
1-10 Stacks - Pulse marked targets for 5 seconds 11-25 Stacks - Pulse and Disrupt marked targets for 5 seconds 26-49 Stacks - Pulse, Disrupt and Disorient market targets for 5 seconds 50 Stacks - Pulse, Disrupt and Disorient marked targets and all hostiles within 10 meters of the marked targets for 5 seconds.
This effect will trigger immediately if any marked enemy is killed.
talents.pvp:
Shooting an enemy marks them and adds a stack to a count of 50.
Shooting a marked enemy refreshes the mark and adds stacks to the agent.
When you deploy a non-shield skill, remove all stacks on agent and all marked targets trigger an effect.
1-10 Stacks - Pulse marked targets for 3 seconds 11-25 Stacks - Pulse and Disrupt marked targets for 3 seconds 26-49 Stacks - Pulse, Disrupt and Disorient market targets for 3 seconds 50 Stacks - Pulse, Disrupt and Disorient marked targets and all hostiles within 6 meters of the marked targets for 3 seconds.
This effect will trigger immediately if any marked enemy is killed.

talents.name: Bullet Hell
talents.pve:
This weapon never needs to be reloaded.
For every 100 bullets that hit an enemy, replenish one magazine worth of ammo to you and all your allies' ammo reserves.
talents.pvp:
This weapon never needs to be reloaded.
For every 100 bullets that hit an enemy, replenish one magazine worth of ammo to you and all your allies' ammo reserves.

talents.name: Ardent
talents.pve:
Shooting heats the weapon up, filling the "heat meter".
The meter is equivalent to 50% of the weapon's standard Magazine Size.
When the meter is full, rounds shot by the weapon ignite enemies.
When not shooting, the meter constantly depletes.
Reloading or swapping to another weapon fully depletes the meter.
talents.pvp:
Shooting heats the weapon up, filling the "heat meter".
The meter is equivalent to 80% of the weapon's standard Magazine Size.
When the meter is full, rounds shot by the weapon ignite enemies.
When not shooting, the meter constantly depletes.
Reloading or swapping to another weapon fully depletes the meter.

talents.name: Pakhan
talents.pve: Each kill with this weapon gains a stack of 75% Base Magazine Size increase to the next magazine, up to 4 stacks.
talents.pvp: Each kill with this weapon gains a stack of 50% Base Magazine Size increase to the next magazine, up to 4 stacks.

talents.name: Plague of the Outcasts
talents.pve:
Hits apply a debuff dealing 100% weapon damage over 10 seconds.
This stacks up to 50 times.
Whenever an enemy dies with this debuff, all stacks are transferred to a nearby enemy within 25 meters.
talents.pvp:
Hits apply a debuff dealing 60% weapon damage over 6 seconds.
This stacks up to 50 times.
Whenever an enemy dies with this debuff, 30% of all stacks are transferred to a nearby enemy within 6 meters.

talents.name: Transfusion
talents.pve:
Hitting headshots builds stacks, up to a max of 8.
When shooting and Ally or Skill, repair them for 50% of the weapon's Total Damage value for each stack.
Healed Allies will receive 50% of your Repair Skills bonus as Bonus Armor for each stack for 10s.
All hits are guaranteed headshots for 8s after healing an Ally or Skill while at maximum stacks.
talents.pvp:
Hitting headshots builds stacks, up to a max of 10.
When shooting and Ally or Skill, repair them for 30% of the weapon's Total Damage value for each stack.
Healed Allies will receive 40% of your Repair Skills bonus as Bonus Armor for each stack for 6s.
All hits are guaranteed headshots for 4s after healing an Ally or Skill while at maximum stacks.

talents.name: Agonizing Bite
talents.pve:
Diamondback randomly marks an enemy within 20m.
If no enemies are within 20m, it marks the closest enemy to you.
Hitting that enemy consumes the mark, guaranteeing a critical hit and amplifying damage of the hit by 20%.
After hitting a mark, all shots fired are guaranteed critical hits for 5 seconds.
A new random enemy is marked afterwards and whenever you reload.
talents.pvp:
Diamondback randomly marks a non-player enemy.
Hitting that enemy consumes the mark, guaranteeing a critical hit with damage amplified by 20%.
After either hitting a marked non-player enemy or a headshot on a player, all shots fired are guaranteed critical hits for 4s.
A new random non-player enemy is marked afterwards and whenever you reload.

talents.name: Doctor Home
talents.pve:
Shooting an enemy with this weapon will apply a mark for 5 seconds.
If a marked target is killed it will drop a 10% armor repair kit which applies to the whole party.
The kit will not give bonus armor.
talents.pvp:
Shooting an enemy with this weapon will apply a mark for 5 seconds.
If a marked target is killed it will drop a 10% armor repair kit which applies to the whole party.
The kit will not give bonus armor.

talents.name: Binary Trigger
talents.pve:
This weapon fires on trigger pull and release.
If both bullets hit the same enemy, gain a stack.
At 7 stacks, shooting an enemy deals 500% amplified damage and creates a 7m explosion dealing 500% weapon damage, consuming the stacks.
talents.pvp:
This weapon fires on trigger pull and release.
If both bullets hit the same enemy, gain a stack.
At 8 stacks, shooting an enemy deals 250% amplified damage and creates a 3m explosion dealing 250% weapon damage, consuming the stacks.

talents.name: Binary Trigger
talents.pve:
This weapon fires on trigger pull and release.
If both bullets hit the same enemy, gain a stack.
At 7 stacks, shooting an enemy deals 500% amplified damage and creates a 7m explosion dealing 500% weapon damage, consuming the stacks.
talents.pvp:
This weapon fires on trigger pull and release.
If both bullets hit the same enemy, gain a stack.
At 8 stacks, shooting an enemy deals 250% amplified damage and creates a 3m explosion dealing 250% weapon damage, consuming the stacks.

talents.name: Geri and Freki
talents.pve:
On trigger pull, fire both barrels at once.
When fired from the right shoulder, hits add offensive primers.
When fired from the left shoulder, hits add defensive primers.
Hits from one shoulder will detonate all of the opposite shoulder's primers when present.
When detonated or affected enemy is killed, each offensive primer deals 100% weapon damage, while each defensive primer grants 4% bonus armor and 10% amplified damage to armor plates for 5s.
Primer effectiveness is doubled at 10 stacks.
talents.pvp:
On trigger pull, fire both barrels at once.
When fired from the right shoulder, hits add offensive primers.
When fired from the left shoulder, hits add defensive primers.
Hits from one shoulder will detonate all of the opposite shoulder's primers when present.
When detonated or affected enemy is killed, each offensive primer deals 60% weapon damage, while each defensive primer grants 2.5% bonus armor and 5% amplified damage to armor plates for 5s.
Primer effectiveness is doubled at 10 stacks.

talents.name: Ortiz Assault Interface
talents.pve:
While scoped, the weapon will highlight a random body section of each enemy.
The weapon amplifies damage by +60% Weapon Damage to highlighted enemy's body sections.
talents.pvp:
While scoped, the weapon will highlight a random body section of each enemy.
The weapon amplifies damage by +40% Weapon Damage to highlighted enemy's body sections.

talents.name: Full Stop
talents.pve:
Shooting enemies builds stacks to a cap of 20.
Headshots grant 2 stacks.
Each stack grants 2% Weapon Damage and 5% Headshot Damage.
On reload, clear all stacks and gain 5% of your max Armor as temporary armor for 10 seconds for each stack removed.
Headshot kills with Dread Edict restore all bullets in the magazine.
This does not count as a reload.
talents.pvp:
Shooting enemies builds stacks to a cap of 20.
Headshots grant 2 stacks.
Each stack grants 1.5% Weapon Damage and 4% Headshot Damage.
On reload, clear all stacks and gain 1.5% of your max Armor as temporary armor for 4 seconds for each stack removed.
Headshot kills with Dread Edict restore all bullets in the magazine.
This does not count as a reload.

talents.name: In Plain Sight
talents.pve:
Your scoped view displays additional information about enemies not targetting you.
Your scoped view highlights weakpoints.
Headshot and weakpoint damage against enemies not targetting you is amplified by 50%.
Headshot kills reset the cooldown of you Decoy Skill.
This bonus will wait until your current decoy goes on cooldown if currently active.
talents.pvp:
Your scoped view displays additional information about enemies not targetting you.
Your scoped view highlights weakpoints.
Headshot and weakpoint damage against enemies not targetting you is amplified by 40%.
Headshot kills reset the cooldown of you Decoy Skill.
This bonus will wait until your current decoy goes on cooldown if currently active. (This talent has no functionality against enemy agents in PvP environments.)

talents.name: Electromagnetic
talents.pve: Accelerator
talents.pvp: Accelerator

talents.name: Electromagnetic Accelerator
talents.pve: Shots fired deal 0-100% weapon damage based on how long the trigger is held before releasing.
talents.pvp: Shots fired deal 0-68% weapon damage based on how long the trigger is held before releasing.

talents.name: The Trap
talents.pve:
Tags enemies when in scope (maximum 10).
Killing any marked target with a headshot applies 10 seconds Burn Status Effect and gives a 50% Movement Speed decrease on all other targets.
Cooldown is 30 seconds.
Killing another enemy with a headshot shortens the cooldown for 10 seconds.
Targets are marked after 1 seconds in scope.
talents.pvp:
Tags enemies when in scope (maximum 6).
Killing any marked target with a headshot applies 4 seconds Burn Status Effect and gives a 14% Movement Speed decrease on all other targets.
Cooldown is 40 seconds.
Killing another enemy with a headshot shortens the cooldown for 10 seconds.
Targets are marked after 1 seconds in scope.

talents.name: High Priority Target
talents.pve:
Amplifies Weapon Damage by 125% to the highest ranking enemies within the Tier hierarchy.
Tier 1: Hunter, Rogue, Leader, Tank, Shield, Heavy Weapons, RPG, Medic, Controller, Warhound, Marauder
Tier 2: Support, Engineer, Bodyguard, Immobilizer, Bomber, Mini Tank, Drone Operator
Tier 3: Any other enemy or skill proxy
talents.pvp:
Amplifies Weapon Damage by 62% to the highest ranking enemies within the Tier hierarchy.
Tier 1: Hunter, Rogue, Leader, Tank, Shield, Heavy Weapons, RPG, Medic, Controller, Warhound, Marauder
Tier 2: Support, Engineer, Bodyguard, Immobilizer, Bomber, Mini Tank, Drone Operator
Tier 3: Any other enemy or skill proxy (This talent has no functionality against agents in PvP environments.)

talents.name: Sandman
talents.pve:
Melee attacks instantly kill non-elite enemies.
Cooldown: 15 seconds.
talents.pvp:
Melee attacks kill players with 15% armor or less.
Cooldown: 15 seconds.

talents.name: Sandman
talents.pve:
Melee attacks instantly kill non-elite enemies.
Cooldown: 15 seconds.
talents.pvp:
Melee attacks kill players with 15% armor or less.
Cooldown: 15 seconds.

talents.name: Capitulate
talents.pve:
Hitting an enemy will apply a stack of -4% Movement Speed for each pellet hit for 5 seconds.
Shotting the enemy again will reapply the stacks.
talents.pvp:
Hitting an enemy will apply a stack of -3% Movement Speed for each pellet hit for 6 seconds.
Shotting the enemy again will reapply the stacks.

talents.name: Septic Shock
talents.pve:
Shooting a target applies stacks of venom, which last for 10s.
Increasing stacks adds more severe debuffs to the target.
1 - Poison (PVP = Bleed)
3 - Disorient (PVP = Disrupt)
6 - Shock (PVP = Ensnare)
7 - Target takes 20% damage (from all sources).
Stacks no longer increase.
Duration of Status Effects is based on percentage of pellets hit on applying shot.
talents.pvp:
Shooting a target applies stacks of venom, which last for 10s.
Increasing stacks adds more severe debuffs to the target.
2 - Poison (PVP = Bleed)
4 - Disorient (PVP = Disrupt)
8 - Shock (PVP = Ensnare) 10 - Target takes 18% damage (from all sources).
Stacks no longer increase.
Duration of Status Effects is based on percentage of pellets hit on applying shot.

talents.name: Autentico
talents.pve:
+35% Weapon Damage +100% Accuracy No Damage Drop Off.
These bonuses are built into the weapon's base stats.
talents.pvp:
+35% Weapon Damage +100% Accuracy No Damage Drop Off.
These bonuses are built into the weapon's base stats.

talents.name: Busy Little Bee
talents.pve:
Each shot to a different target will give 1 stack, up to 10 max, with each stack giving 20% Weapon Damage increase.
Stacks will activate once the weapon is switched and will last for 10 seconds.
Changing weapon again during the said 10 seconds will cancel the buff.
talents.pvp:
Each shot to a different target will give 1 stack, up to 6 max, with each stack giving 4% Weapon Damage increase.
Stacks will activate once the weapon is switched and will last for 8 seconds.
Changing weapon again during the said 8 seconds will cancel the buff.

talents.name: Liberty or Death
talents.pve:
Hits grant +2% weapon damage.
Stacks up to 30.
Headshots consume all stacks, repairing your shield for 3% per stack.
talents.pvp:
Hits grant +2% weapon damage.
Stacks up to 30.
Headshots consume all stacks, repairing your shield for 3% per stack.

talents.name: Mosquito Song
talents.pve:
Hitting an enemy applies a stack.
Stacks are shared between players.
At 5 stacks, the enemy will forcefully target the last player to apply a stack for 5s and take 25% more damage to armor.
Stacks deplete every 5s.
Activating the effect on an enemy will remove all stacks from other enemies.
talents.pvp:
Hitting an enemy applies a stack.
Stacks are shared between players.
At 5 stacks, the enemy will forcefully target the last player to apply a stack for 5s and take 25% more damage to armor.
Stacks deplete every 5s.
Activating the effect on an enemy will remove all stacks from other enemies. (This talent has no functionality against enemy agents in PvP environments.)

talents.name: Sport Mode
talents.pve: +20% Movement Speed. (Global Max Movement Speed: 20%)
talents.pvp: +6% Movement Speed. (Global Max Movement Speed: 20%)

talents.name: Regicide
talents.pve: Headshot kills create a 5m explosion, dealing 400% weapon damage and applying bleed to all enemies hit.
talents.pvp: Headshot kills create a 4m explosion, dealing 320% weapon damage and applying bleed to all enemies hit.

talents.name: Restrained
talents.pve: Deal 25% Amplified Damage for 20s after your Shield gets broken.
talents.pvp: Deal 20% Amplified Damage for 20s after your Shield gets broken.

talents.name: Faster Than Reloading
talents.pve:
Having this weapon holstered for 5s reloads and primes it.
While primed, swapping to this weapon reloads your Primary and Secondary weapons and grants +20% Rate of Fire and +50% Weapon Damage until its magazine is emptied.
Reloading or swapping from this weapon before its magazine is emptied will remove its stat bonuses.
talents.pvp:
Having this weapon holstered for 8s reloads and primes it.
While primed, swapping to this weapon reloads your Primary and Secondary weapons and grants +10% Rate of Fire and +18% Weapon Damage until its magazine is emptied.
Reloading or swapping from this weapon before its magazine is emptied will remove its stat bonuses.

talents.name: Vicious Cycle
talents.pve:
Taking damage builds stacks to a cap of 30.
Each stack grants 1.5% Weapon Damage.
Taking damage at max stacks triggers a purge, removing all stacks and Status Effects and then dropping a healing cloud which restores 5% of Max Armor for 10s to all allies in the cloud.
talents.pvp:
Taking damage builds stacks to a cap of 30.
Each stack grants 1% Weapon Damage.
Taking damage at max stacks triggers a purge, removing all stacks and Status Effects and then dropping a healing cloud which restores 4% of Max Armor for 14s to all allies in the cloud.

talents.name: Pack Instincts
talents.pve:
You and all group members gain a damage buff based on the distance of the last enemy you hit.
0-15m: +25% critical hit damage 15-25m: +10% critical hit chance and +10% critical hit damage 25m+: +25% critcal hit Chance A group member can receive all 3 damage buffs at the same time.
However, a group member can only have 1 of each damage buff at a time.
talents.pvp:
You and all group members gain a damage buff based on the distance of the last enemy you hit.
0-15m: +18% critical hit damage 15-25m: +8% critical hit chance and +8% critical hit damage 25m+: +18% critcal hit Chance A group member can receive all 3 damage buffs at the same time.
However, a group member can only have 1 of each damage buff at a time.

talents.name: Slotted
talents.pve:
Receive bonuses for each non-Core Attribute on this item, depending on their color:
Red: +10% Critical Hit Chance Yellow: +5% Skill Efficiency
Blue: +1% Armor Regen This item can feature any Core Attribute.
This item features a third random Attribute instead of having a Gear Mod Slot.
This item cannot feature the Headshot Damage, Health or Skill Repair.
talents.pvp:
Receive bonuses for each non-Core Attribute on this item, depending on their color:
Red: +8% Critical Hit Chance Yellow: +2.5% Skill Efficiency
Blue: +0.5% Armor Regen This item can feature any Core Attribute.
This item features a third random Attribute instead of having a Gear Mod Slot.
This item cannot feature the Headshot Damage, Health or Skill Repair.

talents.name: Catalysis
talents.pve:
Dealing and receiving status effects (Burn, Bleed, Shock, EMP / Disrupt, Poison and Blind / Disorient) builds stacks of Catalysis to a maximum of 12.
Each stack grants: +2% Weapon Damage +2% Status Effects Each enemy within 25 meters that is affected by a status effect grants +1 stack/sec.
Being affected by status effects grants +2 stacks/sec.
Stacks decay at 1 stack/sec after 5s if no enemies in the radius or you are affected by status effects.
talents.pvp:
Dealing and receiving status effects (Burn, Bleed, Shock, EMP / Disrupt, Poison and Blind / Disorient) builds stacks of Catalysis to a maximum of 12.
Each stack grants: +1.2% Weapon Damage +1.4% Status Effects Each enemy within 25 meters that is affected by a status effect grants +1 stack/sec.
Being affected by status effects grants +2 stacks/sec.
Stacks decay at 1 stack/sec after 5s if no enemies in the radius or you are affected by status effects.

talents.name: Reactant
talents.pve: At max stacks, killing a status-affected enemy grants bonuses for 5s: +25% bonus armor +20% reload speed
talents.pvp: At max stacks, killing a status-affected enemy grants bonuses for 5s: +18% bonus armor +16% reload speed

talents.name: Stabilizer
talents.pve: While burning, you can maintain ADS without disruption.
talents.pvp: While burning, you can maintain ADS without disruption.

talents.name: Abridged
talents.pve: If your Primary and Secondary weapon are not Exotic or Named and of the same type, the Secondary Weapon's talent will also be applied to the Primary Weapon. (Doesn't apply to talents that include Weapon Swapping.)
talents.pvp: If your Primary and Secondary weapon are not Exotic or Named and of the same type, the Secondary Weapon's talent will also be applied to the Primary Weapon. (Doesn't apply to talents that include Weapon Swapping.) (This talent has no effect in PvP environments.)

talents.name: Toxic Delivery
talents.pve:
Status effects also apply a damage over time debuff for 10s.
Total Damage dealt is equal to 50% of your concussion grenade damage and is increased by your status effect attributes.
talents.pvp:
Status effects also apply a damage over time debuff for 10s.
Total Damage dealt is equal to 18% of your concussion grenade damage and is increased by your status effect attributes.

talents.name: Bond
talents.pve:
Both you and Allies receive +30% Critical Hit Damage, +15% Skill Efficiency and +2% Armor Regen when an Ally is within 10m of you.
Receive +15% Critical Hit Damage, +7.5% Skill Efficiency and +1% Armor Regen when one of your Skills is within 10m of you.
Only the highest group of buffs can be active at one time.
talents.pvp:
Both you and Allies receive +25% Critical Hit Damage, +6% Skill Efficiency and +0.5% Armor Regen when an Ally is within 6m of you.
Receive +10% Critical Hit Damage, +8% Skill Efficiency and +0.5% Armor Regen when one of your Skills is within 6m of you.
Only the highest group of buffs can be active at one time.

talents.name: Hoarder
talents.pve: +3 Grenade Capacity +50% Grenade Radius +35% Grenade Damage +25% Grenade Damage for each extra enemy caught in the blast Automatically regenerate grenades every 30s, if you have less than 2 grenades in your inventory.
talents.pvp: +3 Grenade Capacity +30% Grenade Radius +22% Grenade Damage +25% Grenade Damage for each extra enemy caught in the blast Automatically regenerate grenades every 30s, if you have less than 2 grenades in your inventory.

talents.name: Challenger
talents.pve: Receive +25% Damage Resistance from enemies within 20m.
talents.pvp: Receive +20% Damage Resistance from enemies within 8m.

talents.name: Bleeding Edge
talents.pve:
Shooting enemies within 15m applies bleed to the target.
Repair 3-48% of your armor per second for every enemy that is bleeding within 15m.
Repair strength per number of bleeding enemies: 1: 3% 2: 6% 3: 12% 4: 24% 5: 48%
talents.pvp:
Shooting enemies within 12m applies bleed to the target.
Repair 2-32% of your armor per second for every enemy that is bleeding within 12m.
Repair strength per number of bleeding enemies: 1: 2% 2: 4% 3: 8% 4: 16% 5: 32%

talents.name: Ablative Nano-Plating
talents.pve:
Whenever you or any ally's armor breaks, they gain 80% of your armor as bonus armor for 10s.
Cooldown per ally: 45s Killing an enemy with your specialization weapon removes this cooldown for all allies.
talents.pvp:
Whenever you or any ally's armor breaks, they gain 45% of your armor as bonus armor for 4s.
Cooldown per ally: 55s Killing an enemy with your specialization weapon removes this cooldown for all allies. (Specialization / Signature Weapon has no functionality in PvP environments.)

talents.name: One in the Hand..
talents.pve:
Throwing a grenade refunds it and grants +1 skill tier for 15s.
Grants overcharge if already at skill tier 6
Cooldown: 60s
talents.pvp:
Throwing a grenade refunds it and grants +1 skill tier for 10s.
Grants overcharge if already at skill tier 6
Cooldown: 60s (Overcharge has no functionality in PvP environments.)

talents.name: ..Two in the bag
talents.pve: +1 Armor Kit Capacity +3 Grenade Capacity +25% Ammo Capacity +10% Repair-Skills +10% Status Effects
talents.pvp: +2 Armor Kit Capacity +3 Grenade Capacity +20% Ammo Capacity +10% Repair-Skills +6% Status Effects

talents.name: Combat Medic
talents.pve:
+90% Revive Speed -50% Weakened debuff time +45% Hive Efficiency Provides 50% Damage Resistance to both agents while reviving or being revived, and for 5s after a successful Hive Revive, or 10s after a Manual Revive.
Any successful revives provide +1 Skill Tier for 30s.
Revives at Skill Tier 6 grant Overcharge for 15s.
talents.pvp:
+75% Revive Speed -30% Weakened debuff time +30% Hive Efficiency Provides 30% Damage Resistance to both agents while reviving or being revived, and for 3s after a successful Hive Revive, or 5s after a Manual Revive.
Any successful revives provide +1 Skill Tier for 6s.
Revives at Skill Tier 6 grant Overcharge for 3s. (Overcharge has no functionality in PvP environments.)

talents.name: Rebalance
talents.pve:
Getting kills and hitting enemies 3 times builds Red stacks.
Each stack provides 0.5% Weapon Damage.
Getting hit 3 times builds Blue stacks.
Each stack provides 0.5% Damage Resistance.
Upon reaching 80 stacks in total, lose all stacks and receive a separate bonus of 0.5% Damage Resistance per Red stack and 0.5% Weapon Damage per Blue stack until the next time the stack cap is reached.
talents.pvp:
Getting kills and hitting enemies 4 times builds Red stacks.
Each stack provides 0.25% Weapon Damage.
Getting hit 4 times builds Blue stacks.
Each stack provides 0.25% Damage Resistance.
Upon reaching 60 stacks in total, lose all stacks and receive a separate bonus of 0.5% Damage Resistance per Red stack and 0.5% Weapon Damage per Blue stack until the next time the stack cap is reached.

talents.name: Kill Confirmed
talents.pve:
Enemies you kill drop a trophy on death.
Collecting trophies provides both a short and long term buff.
The first of which scales with the number of core attributes equipped and lasts 10s.
Red Core: 5% Weapon Damage Blue Core: 10% Bonus Armor Yellow Core: 5% Skill Effciency For every trophy collected gain an additional +1% weapon damage, +1% skill efficiency and +0.1% armor regeneration for 300s Maximum 30 stacks
talents.pvp:
Enemies you kill drop a trophy on death.
Collecting trophies provides both a short and long term buff.
The first of which scales with the number of core attributes equipped and lasts 8s.
Red Core: 3% Weapon Damage Blue Core: 6% Bonus Armor Yellow Core: 3% Skill Effciency For every trophy collected gain an additional +1% weapon damage, +1% skill efficiency and +0.1% armor regeneration for 120s Maximum 20 stacks

talents.name: Parkour!
talents.pve: Performing a cover to cover or vaulting reloads your drawn weapon and grants +25% bonus arrmor for 5s.
talents.pvp: Performing a cover to cover or vaulting reloads your drawn weapon and grants +30% bonus arrmor for 3s.

talents.name: Over the Top
talents.pve:
Damaging an enemy with a grenade or striking an enemy with a melee attack, activates Seeing Red.
Seeing Red grants +25% weapon damage and +100% melee damage.
Seeing Red lasts 20 seconds and starts a 60 second cooldown after completion.
While in cooldown, striking an enemy with a melee attack or hitting an enemy with the effect of a grenade will complete the cooldown instantly.
talents.pvp:
Damaging an enemy with a grenade or striking an enemy with a melee attack, activates Seeing Red.
Seeing Red grants +25% weapon damage and +120% melee damage.
Seeing Red lasts 24 seconds and starts a 70 second cooldown after completion.
While in cooldown, striking an enemy with a melee attack or hitting an enemy with the effect of a grenade will complete the cooldown instantly.

talents.name: Transference Overclock
talents.pve:
Grants 15% Hive skill haste per skill tier.
Detonating a hive refreshes your skill cooldowns and grants overcharge for 15s.
If at Skill Tier 6, this effect also applies to all allies.
Allies recieving this effect are unable to benefit from it again for 120s
talents.pvp:
Detonating a hive refreshes your skill cooldowns and grants overcharge for 15s.
If at Skill Tier 6, this effect also applies to all allies.
Allies recieving this effect are unable to benefit from it again for 120s (Overcharge has no functionality in PvP environments).

talents.name: Smoke Screen
talents.pve:
On Armor break, drop a Smoke Bomb at your feet, concealing you from enemies for 3s.
Cooldown: 40s.
talents.pvp:
On Armor break, drop a Smoke Bomb at your feet, concealing you from enemies for 4s.
Cooldown: 60s.

talents.name: Weakest Link
talents.pve:
Amplifies Weapon Damage by 30% to the lowest ranking enemies within the Tier hierarchy.
Tier 1: Hunter, Rogue, Leader, Tank, Shield, Heavy Weapons, RPG, Medic, Controller, Warhound, Marauder
Tier 2: Support, Engineer, Bodyguard, Immobilizer, Bomber, Mini Tank, Drone Operator
Tier 3: Any other enemy or skill proxy
talents.pvp:
Amplifies Weapon Damage by 18% to the lowest ranking enemies within the Tier hierarchy.
Tier 1: Hunter, Rogue, Leader, Tank, Shield, Heavy Weapons, RPG, Medic, Controller, Warhound, Marauder
Tier 2: Support, Engineer, Bodyguard, Immobilizer, Bomber, Mini Tank, Drone Operator
Tier 3: Any other enemy or skill proxy (This talent has no functionality against agents in PvP environments.)

talents.name: Iron Grip
talents.pve: -50% Recoil Penalty when hip-firing -50% Recoil Penalty when blind-firing from cover
talents.pvp: -50% Recoil Penalty when hip-firing -50% Recoil Penalty when blind-firing from cover

talents.name: Counter
talents.pve:
Swapping weapons will give the following groups of bonuses one by one, in order: 1.
+20% Rate of Fire, +20% Weapon Damage 2.
+50% Magazine Size, +50% Reload Speed The bonuses remain active for 12s or until the next weapon swap.
Swapping to your sidearm will not trigger the next group of bonuses.
talents.pvp:
Swapping weapons will give the following groups of bonuses one by one, in order: 1.
+10% Rate of Fire, +16% Weapon Damage 2.
+30% Magazine Size, +40% Reload Speed The bonuses remain active for 7s or until the next weapon swap.
Swapping to your sidearm will not trigger the next group of bonuses.

talents.name: Quick Draw
talents.pve:
While your pistol is holstered, gain a stacking buff every 0.3s, up to 100.
When you swap to it, your first shot consumes the buff and deals +10% damage per stack (for a maximum of 1000% damage).
This deals headshot damage anywhere you hit.
talents.pvp:
While your pistol is holstered, gain a stacking buff every 1s, up to 36.
When you swap to it, your first shot consumes the buff and deals +1% damage per stack.
This deals headshot damage anywhere you hit.

talents.name: Dragon's Glare
talents.pve:
While in combat, applies burn to the enemy closest to you within 20m.
Cooldown: 35s
talents.pvp:
While in combat, applies burn to the enemy closest to you within 20m.
Cooldown: 25s

talents.name: Bob and Weave
talents.pve:
Receive repair of 5% of your Total Armor for every 1m run in cover-to-cover.
Damage taken while doing a cover-to-cover is healed over 10s.
talents.pvp:
Receive repair of 3% of your Total Armor for every 1m run in cover-to-cover.
Damage taken while doing a cover-to-cover is healed over 16s.

talents.name: Defibrillator
talents.pve:
While "Shocker Punch" is equipped, the stun received by the agent from the Shock status effect will be reduced by 50%.
Using a shield will give 100% to melee damage.
Using St.
Elmo's Engine with the holster will give 100% extra melee damage and will make the next melee attack apply shock to the target.
Using all three items will offer all of the above mentioned bonuses and the shock from the melee attack will have a 5m radius, starting from the first target.
15 second cooldown.
talents.pvp:
While "Shocker Punch" is equipped, the stun received by the agent from the Shock status effect will be reduced by 60%.
Using a shield will give 80% to melee damage.
Using St.
Elmo's Engine with the holster will give 60% extra melee damage and will make the next melee attack apply shock to the target.
Using all three items will offer all of the above mentioned bonuses and the shock from the melee attack will have a 3m radius, starting from the first target.
36 second cooldown.

talents.name: Alternating Current
talents.pve:
Generate a stack of 2.5% Skill Damage on one of your skills every second, capping at 10 stacks.
When at 10 stacks, 10 seconds passes before the stacks transfer to the other skill one by one.
The process then repeats.
talents.pvp:
Generate a stack of 2% Skill Damage on one of your skills every second, capping at 10 stacks.
When at 10 stacks, 10 seconds passes before the stacks transfer to the other skill one by one.
The process then repeats.

talents.name: Escape Plan
talents.pve:
Vaulting, climbing or dropping from on top of an object gives +10% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
After not moving for 5 seconds, receive +20% Movement Speed for 5 seconds.
Being applied a Status Effect will provide +10% Movement Speed for 5 seconds.
Max Movement Speed bonus is 20%.
The bonuses do not stack with Movement Speed bonuses from other sources.
-50% Movement Impairment penalty from Status Effects.
talents.pvp:
Vaulting, climbing or dropping from on top of an object gives +10% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
After not moving for 5 seconds, receive +10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
Being applied a Status Effect will provide +10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
Max Movement Speed bonus is 20%.
The bonuses do not stack with Movement Speed bonuses from other sources.
-30% Movement Impairment penalty from Status Effects.

talents.name: Ostracize
talents.pve:
Shooting an enemy applies a mark.
Only one mark can be active at a time.
The mark disappears after 15s, or when the marked enemy dies.
Receive 600% Amplified Damage from the marked enemy.
Deal 20% Amplified Damage to unmarked enemies.
If only one enemy remains in combat, the mark disappears and cannot be reapplied.
talents.pvp:
Shooting an enemy applies a mark.
Only one mark can be active at a time.
The mark disappears after 0s, or when the marked enemy dies.
Receive 0% Amplified Damage from the marked enemy.
Deal 0% Amplified Damage to unmarked enemies.
If only one enemy remains in combat, the mark disappears and cannot be reapplied. (This talent has no functionality in PvP environments.)

talents.name: Stand Your Ground
talents.pve:
Cannot be staggered by explosions.
Increases total weapon damage by 3% each second you are not moving.
Stacks up to 10 until you start moving.
Stacks decay gradually once you start moving.
All stacks are lost 10s after moving.
talents.pvp:
Cannot be staggered by explosions.
Increases total weapon damage by 3% each second you are not moving.
Stacks up to 10 until you start moving.
Stacks decay gradually once you start moving.
All stacks are lost 10s after moving.
